judgment.summary: High-growth business with strong gross margins and cash flow, though currently unprofitable with a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.01 beat the 0.90 estimate by 12.6%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-05-26.
positives: Gross margin 76.6% — high scalability and product value.
Free cash flow $1.02B (TTM) — strong ability to generate cash.
Total cash $3.51B vs $1.87B debt — healthy net cash position.
negatives: Profit margin -2.3% — business is currently operating at a loss.
Return on equity -3.6% — negative returns for shareholders.

news.paragraph: Zscaler is seeing positive analyst sentiment following an upgrade from B. Riley to a Buy rating with a $225 price target. Traders should also consider the rising adoption of Z-Flex, which is being highlighted as a potential new revenue growth catalyst. This recent momentum follows a share price rebound and increased interest from Wall Street analysts.
